name: maps_equal_from_contains_pair
reason: Two maps with identical contains_pair sets are extensionally equal — direct consequence of the verified lemma

name: empty_maps_equal
reason: Two empty maps are trivially equal — tests the degenerate case where both precondition quantifiers are vacuously true

name: singleton_maps_equal
reason: Two identical singleton maps are equal — tests the minimal non-trivial case

name: contains_pair_symmetric_implies_equal
code:
proof fn phi_4_contains_pair_symmetric_implies_equal(m1: Map<nat, nat>, m2: Map<nat, nat>)
    requires
        m1 =~= m2,
    ensures
        m1 === m2,
{
}
reason: Extensional equality (`=~=`) implies deep equality (`===`) for maps — tests that the `=~=` to `===` step works directly

name: insert_preserves_equality
reason: Inserting a key-value pair makes it a contained pair — tests the basic Map axiom that the lemma relies on
